steps.title: Interpret the constant term
steps.content: The function is $f(t)=12t+7$. The constant term $7$ is the value of the function when $t=0$.

steps.title: Use t = 0
steps.content: Substitute $t=0$: $$f(0)=12(0)+7=7.$$ Since $t=0$ is the moment Maya purchased the plant, the plant's estimated length then was $7$ inches.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: This matches D. The $12$ is the monthly growth rate, while $7$ is the initial length.
